entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `url` TEXT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `sourceType` TEXT NOT NULL, `visitedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_history_entries_visitedAt
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_history_entries_visitedAt` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`visitedAt`)
